column1: # ZAP Baseline Rules — Quality Governance Platform
# Reviewed: 2026-04-07 — suppressions are scope-limited to known-acceptable findings only.
# FAIL is the default for HIGH/CRITICAL; WARNs appear in report but do not block.
# ── Informational / style alerts (non-exploitable in this context) ──

column3: # X-Content-Type-Options header — set by Azure WAF upstream, not app layer
# X-Frame-Options header — CSP frame-ancestors policy covers this
# Incomplete/missing charset — irrelevant for JSON API responses
# Strict-Transport-Security — enforced by Azure Front Door / CDN
# Information disclosure: suspicious XML comment — only in healthz XML probe
# Timestamp disclosure — structured log timestamps intentionally included
# CSP header — warn only; Azure CDN injection path difference from ZAP scan

column1: # ── Authentication-related (ZAP scans unauthenticated baseline; these are expected 401s) ──
